layout: pixel-perfect Twitter/X mobile UI, full-width tweet card on white background
layout_constraints: all elements must fit fully within frame with no cutoff or truncation

profile.avatar: American woman late 40s, brown hair with gray streaks, warm tired smile, casual home photo

tweet_text: My husband has finished in under two minutes for 12 years. I stopped saying anything because what's the point. He started using this device that trains the muscle that controls it. Week 3 he lasted so long I asked if he took something. He said no. It's just the muscle finally working. I'm still in shock.

embedded_image.scene_description: bedroom nightstand with device charging, morning coffee, sunlight through curtains, unmade bed in background

product_reference.placement: on nightstand, right of coffee mug, charging cable attached
product_reference.lighting_match: warm morning sunlight from window, soft shadows

negative_prompt: wrong twitter interface, old twitter design, explicit content, clinical setting, young couple, elements cut off, text truncated, generic product render, wrong product shape
